description: Ward confronts Garrett about being abandoned in the past, as Garrett suffers a sudden health crisis. Ward stabilizes him in the medical bay, prompting Garrett to admit that his organs are failing and he only has months to live. This personal revelation reframes Garrett's desperation and his interest in GH-325 as a bid for personal survival, not just fielding super soldiers.

transcript.line: You were gonna let me die!
Okay. First off, I think we should use our indoor voices.
Since the day we met, I have done everything you asked.
You were gonna let Deathlok kill me to get that hard drive?
Come on. We both know the girl wasn't gonna let you die. You said yourself Skye's a soft touch, just like you.
I am not that scared kid anymore.
Then stop acting like it! Stop being weak. All these years, and you're still playing the victim. Sometimes I ask myself why I ever bothered.
John! John! Everybody out! Now! Yeah. Here we go. That's it. I said, “get the hell out!”
Alright. Hang in there. I'll get you stabilized.
